name: io.github.tradeparadex/mcp-paradex-py
title: Paradex Trading
description: MCP server for Paradex perp trading. Market data, accounts, orders, positions, and vaults.

environmentVariables.name: PARADEX_ACCOUNT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ethereum private key for your Paradex account (enables trading). Without this, only public market data is accessible.

environmentVariables.name: PARADEX_ENVIRONMENT
environmentVariables.description: Paradex environment to connect to. Defaults to 'prod'. Use 'testnet' for testing.
